CONTENT.Career: He made over 200 appearances in the Ligue 2 for Laval.In June 2016, he joined Strasbourg on a two-year contract.On 23 June 2019, he signed a three-year contract with Caen. He was named captain, replacing the departing Fayçal Fajr.In July 2022, Anthony Gonçalves signed a new "1+1 year" contract with Laval, as the club returns to Ligue 2.
CONTENT.Early life: Anthony Gonçalves was born in Chartres, the capital of the Eure-et-Loir department of France.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Gonçalves is of Portuguese descent.
CONTENT.External links: Anthony Gonçalves at foot-national.comAnthony Gonçalves – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in FrenchAnthony Gonçalves at L'Équipe Football (in French)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 1 July 2019

SUMMARY: Anthony Gonçalves (born 6 March 1986) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 2 club Laval.
